= number





Converts a value to a number (int64 or float64)

== Parameters

*`default`* &lt;float&gt; (optional) An optional value to yield if the target cannot be parsed as a number.


== Examples

[,bloblang]
----
root.foo = this.thing.number() + 10
root.bar = this.thing.number(5) * 10
----
